title: The Emoji
description: adds an emoji to terrify your game
body:
Welcome. This is a "horror" mod that adds 2 features to your game which make it much "scarier."

-😃Emoji😃, a strong hostile entity that lights fire when hit, and gains buffs when made contact with. It even gets strength when it falls from a block

-Emoji block, a creepy block that does nothing but... 𝐰𝐚𝐭𝐜𝐡.

If you like a tough survival challenge and / or "horror", this is the mod for you.

😃
